text: 🇺🇸 "If we just left, the strait's gonna open up, otherwise they'd make no money." - Trump 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 “如果我们离开，海峡就会开放，否则他们就赚不到钱了。” - 特朗普 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: OSINTtechnical Trump, when asked if the US has a back-up plan in case talks fail, and Iran keeps Hormuz closed: “You don’t need a back up plan” https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2042720091708543139/video/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 当被问及如果谈判失败且伊朗继续封锁霍尔木兹海峡，美国是否有备用计划时，特朗普回答：“你不需要备用计划” https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2042720091708543139/video/1 推文

text: Disclose.tv NOW - Trump says "one way or the other" the Iran War is "going well," and he will not allow Iran to toll the Strait of Hormuz: "We're not gonna let that happen." https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2042719756164243742/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 快讯 - 特朗普表示，无论如何，伊朗战争“进展顺利”，他不会允许伊朗对霍尔木兹海峡征收通行费：“我们不会让这种情况发生。” https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2042719756164243742/video/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender According to CNN, citing a U.S. official, the U.S.-Iran talks held in Islamabad, Pakistan will be both indirect and direct at the same time. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 据美国有线电视新闻网（CNN）援引美国官员的话称，在巴基斯坦伊斯兰堡举行的美伊会谈将同时进行间接和直接对话。推文

text: WarMonitor UMass Lowell/YouGov poll: 57% say life has gotten harder in the past six months, 67% say the country is on the wrong track. 65% say the U.S. is spending too much on the Iran war, 62% oppose ICE facilities locally, and 87% support Epstein-related investigations. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2042719104193159442/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 马萨诸塞大学洛厄尔分校/YouGov民调显示：57%的人表示过去六个月生活变得更加艰难，67%的人认为国家走错了方向。65%的人认为美国在伊朗战争上的支出过多，62%的人反对在当地设立移民及海关执法局（ICE）设施，87%的人支持与爱泼斯坦相关的调查。https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2042719104193159442/photo/1 推文

text: Visioner 🇺🇲 🇮🇷 Donald Trump stated that a good deal with Iran should include the absence of nuclear weapons. Journalist: What does a good deal look like to you? Donald Trump: The absence of nuclear weapons. That's number one. You know, I think the regime change has already happened, even though we've never had such a... such a criterion. No nuclear weapons. That's what it's all about 99% of the time. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇺🇲 🇮🇷 唐纳德·特朗普表示，与伊朗达成的一项好协议应包括没有核武器。记者：对您来说，好的协议是什么样的？唐纳德·特朗普：没有核武器。这是第一位的。你知道，我认为政权更迭已经发生了，尽管我们从未有过这样的……这样的标准。没有核武器。这就是99%的情况。推文

text: Visioner 🇺🇲 🇮🇷 Donald Trump stated that Iran has suffered a military defeat and now the US intends to open the Strait of Hormuz in any case. "They have suffered a military defeat, and now we will open the Gulf with or without them, but it will be opened. We are going to open the strait, as it is called, and I think it will happen quite quickly, and if not — we will be able to bring the matter to a conclusion in one way or another. Everything is going well," emphasized the US President. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇺🇲 🇮🇷 唐纳德·特朗普表示，伊朗遭受了军事失败，现在美国打算在任何情况下开放霍尔木兹海峡。“他们遭受了军事失败，现在我们将无论如何都要开放海湾，它会被开放的。我们要开放海峡，正如人们所说的那样，我认为这会很快发生，如果不行——我们将能够以某种方式结束这件事。一切进展顺利，”美国总统强调。推文

text: The Spectator Index BREAKING: Trump says will not allow tolls in Strait of Hormuz tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 快讯：特朗普表示不会允许在霍尔木兹海峡征收通行费 推文

text: Visioner 🇺🇲 🇮🇷 Donald Trump wished Vice President Jay D. Vance good luck before his departure for negotiations with Iran. Journalist: What did you say to Jay D. Vance before his departure, sir? Donald Trump: I wished him good luck. He has an important task ahead. We'll find out what's going on there. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇺🇲 🇮🇷 唐纳德·特朗普在副总统杰伊·D·万斯（Jay D. Vance）启程前往与伊朗谈判前祝他好运。记者：先生，您在杰伊·D·万斯离开前对他说了什么？唐纳德·特朗普：我祝他好运。他面前有一项重要任务。我们会找出那里发生了什么。推文

text: Disclose.tv JUST IN - Images released of the Iranian delegation arriving in Pakistan — Tasnim https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2042716314087592219/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 最新消息 - 伊朗代表团抵达巴基斯坦的画面发布 — Tasnim https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2042716314087592219/photo/1 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸🇮🇱 The Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps announced that the 22nd wave of Operation True Promise 4 was carried out this morning under the codename "Ya Hossein ibn Ali." The statement said the new‑generation missiles struck US and Israeli bases in Gulf…" ⚡ 🇶🇦 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Footage released by Al Jazera reveals the damage done by Iranian strikes on the AN/FPS-132 early-warning radar in Qatar. At first glance the damage appears to be moderate. It might be still working due to the scalable nature of radar technology. However the damage done by the fire is unclear. The radar station was attacked in early March. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸🇮🇱 伊斯兰革命卫队宣布，第22波‘真实承诺4’行动于今天上午以‘Ya Hossein ibn Ali’为代号执行。声明称，新一代导弹袭击了海湾地区的美国和以色列基地……” ⚡ 🇶🇦 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 半岛电视台发布的镜头揭示了伊朗对卡塔尔AN/FPS-132预警雷达袭击造成的破坏。乍一看，损坏似乎是中度的。由于雷达技术的可扩展性，它可能仍在工作。然而，火灾造成的损害尚不清楚。该雷达站于3月初遭到袭击。 @wfwitness

text: 🇶🇦 Al Jazeera published exclusive footage of the strikes on Ras Laffan Industrial City, located north of Doha, Qatar. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇶🇦 半岛电视台发布了对位于卡塔尔多哈以北的拉斯拉凡工业城进行袭击的独家镜头。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Reporter: You’re not going to let Iran toll the strait, are you? Trump: We are not gonna let them do it. Nobody knows if they are doing that. If they are doing that, we will not let that happen.
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 记者：你不会让伊朗对海峡征收通行费，对吧？特朗普：我们不会让他们这样做。没人知道他们是否在这样做。如果他们这样做，我们不会让这种情况发生。

text: Tucker Carlson on Trump: I’ve always liked Trump and still feel sorry for him, as I do for all slaves. He’s hemmed in by other forces. He can’t make his own decisions. It’s awful to watch. Source: Newsmax
text_zh: 塔克·卡尔森谈特朗普：我一直很喜欢特朗普，仍然为他感到难过，就像我为所有奴隶感到难过一样。他被其他力量束缚住了。他无法做出自己的决定。看着这一切真是太可怕了。来源：Newsmax

text: Trump: We have other countries coming up to help with the Strait of Hormuz. We will have that open fairly soon.
text_zh: 特朗普：我们有其他国家站出来帮助处理霍尔木兹海峡问题。我们很快就会将其开放。

text: Reporter: What does a good deal look like for you? Trump: No nuclear weapon, number one. I think it has already been regime change—we never had that as a criteria. No nuclear weapon—that is 99% of it.
text_zh: 记者：对您来说，好的协议是什么样的？特朗普：没有核武器，第一。我认为政权更迭已经发生了——我们从未将其作为标准。没有核武器——这就是99%的内容。

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡ 🇺🇸 🇶🇦 Qatari radars heavily damaged after Iranian drone strikes.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡ 🇺🇸 🇶🇦 卡塔尔雷达在伊朗无人机袭击后严重受损。

text: 🇶🇦 U.S. AN/FPS-132 early-warning missile radar system, featured in the On the Front Line documentary by Al Jazeera. ℹ️ Reposted, because we translated the video. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇶🇦 美国AN/FPS-132导弹预警雷达系统，出现在半岛电视台的《前线》纪录片中。 ℹ️ 转发，因为我们翻译了视频。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Trump: We are not doing much talking.
text_zh: 特朗普：我们没有进行太多谈话。

text: 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 ⚡️ Speaker of Iranian Parliament Mohammed Bagher Ghalibaf: "My companions on this flight #Minab168 " .
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 ⚡️ 伊朗议会议长穆罕默德·巴格尔·卡利巴夫（Mohammed Bagher Ghalibaf）：“我这次航班的同伴 #Minab168 ”。

text: Iran’s Ghalibaf: My companions on this flight.
text_zh: 伊朗的卡利巴夫：我这次航班的同伴。

text: Reporter: What is your backup plan if there is no deal? Trump: You don’t need a backup plan.
text_zh: 记者：如果没有达成协议，你的备用计划是什么？特朗普：你不需要备用计划。

text: 🇺🇸 Trump says they will open the strait "one way or the other" 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 特朗普表示他们将“以某种方式”开放海峡 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Trump: The Strait of Hormuz will open up automatically… Otherwise, they make no money. We will open the strait anyway.
text_zh: 特朗普：霍尔木兹海峡会自动开放……否则，他们就赚不到钱。无论如何，我们都会开放海峡。

text: Reporter: You’re not going to let Iran toll the strait, are you? Trump: We are not gonna let them do it. Nobody knows if they are doing that. If they are doing that, we will not let that happen.
text_zh: 记者：你不会让伊朗对海峡征收通行费，对吧？特朗普：我们不会让他们这样做。没人知道他们是否在这样做。如果他们这样做，我们不会让这种情况发生。

text: Trump: The Strait will be open.
text_zh: 特朗普：海峡将会开放。

text: The Spectator Index 🇺🇸 JD Vance has a 38% chance of becoming the Republican Party's presidential nominee for 2028, compared to 24% for Marco Rubio, according to prediction market @Kalshi . https://twitter.com/spectatorindex/status/2042709091680923935/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 🇺🇸 根据预测市场 @Kalshi 的数据，JD·万斯（JD Vance）有38%的机会成为2028年共和党总统候选人，而马可·卢比奥（Marco Rubio）为24%。https://twitter.com/spectatorindex/status/2042709091680923935/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Pakistan's army chief Gen. Asim Munir and Foreign Minister Ishaq Dar received a high-level Iranian delegation in Islamabad led by parliament speaker Bagher Ghalibaf and Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042708338350149654/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 巴基斯坦陆军参谋长阿西姆·穆尼尔（Asim Munir）将军和外交部长伊沙克·达尔（Ishaq Dar）在伊斯兰堡接待了由议会议长卡利巴夫和外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格希（Abbas Araghchi）率领的高级别伊朗代表团。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042708338350149654/video/1 推文

text: WarMonitor So here's an American President offering to use U.S. taxpayer dollars to prop up an authoritarian ally, who also happens to be another of Putin’s puppets. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2042707682004512868/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 所以，这是一位美国总统提议动用美国纳税人的钱来支持一个威权盟友，而这个盟友恰好也是普京的傀儡之一。https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2042707682004512868/photo/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender NASA’s Artemis II mission is set to return to Earth today, following their trip around the moon. According to the released timetable, the Orion crew module will separate from the service module and begin its descent around 7:30 p.m. ET, with the first set of parachutes expected to deploy around 8:00 p.m. ET, following their 3.9 G reentry into Earth’s atmosphere. Due to concerns over the Orion spacecraft’s heat shield, NASA plans to send the craft on a more direct reentry route to limit the time it is exposed to the extreme temperatures of reentry into Earth’s atmosphere. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 美国国家航空航天局（NASA）的阿尔忒弥斯2号（Artemis II）任务在绕月飞行后，定于今天返回地球。根据公布的时间表，猎户座（Orion）乘员舱将与服务舱分离，并于美国东部时间晚上7:30左右开始下降，预计在经历3.9 G的重返大气层过程后，第一组降落伞将于美国东部时间晚上8:00左右部署。由于对猎户座飞船隔热罩的担忧，NASA计划让飞船走一条更直接的重返路线，以限制其暴露在重返地球大气层极端温度下的时间。推文

text: Open Source Intel House Oversight Chair James Comer says he plans to hold hearings with victims of Jeffrey Epstein after First Lady Melania Trump called for Congress to allow victims to testify publicly on Capitol Hill. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042706020888166853/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 众议院监督委员会主席詹姆斯·科默（James Comer）表示，在第一夫人梅拉尼娅·特朗普呼吁国会允许受害者在国会山公开作证后，他计划与杰弗里·爱泼斯坦（Jeffrey Epstein）的受害者举行听证会。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042706020888166853/photo/1 推文

text: WarMonitor Fmr. JAG Corps Captain says Trump “shouldn’t be in charge of the U.S. military,” calling him unfit to command, criticizing his “hang out” orders to troops amid indecision, and blaming his actions for the deaths of 13 soldiers. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2042705583174717567/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 前陆军军法署（JAG Corps）上尉表示，特朗普“不应该负责美国军队”，称他不适合指挥，批评他在优柔寡断的情况下对部队下达“闲逛”命令，并将13名士兵的死亡归咎于他的行为。https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2042705583174717567/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Al Jazeera releases first footage of Iranian missiles hitting Ras Laffan Industrial City, Qatar's gas hub. Major damage to critical infrastructure. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042705238021280027/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 半岛电视台发布了伊朗导弹袭击卡塔尔天然气枢纽拉斯拉凡工业城的首批镜头。关键基础设施遭到严重破坏。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042705238021280027/video/1 推文

text: 📸 The Iranian delegation in Pakistan.
text_zh: 📸 在巴基斯坦的伊朗代表团。

text: 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 JUST IN! Iranian delegation arrives to Islamabad for the the talks. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 快讯！伊朗代表团抵达伊斯兰堡进行会谈。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇱🇺🇸 Lebanon’s presidency announced that the U.S. administration has tasked the State Department with mediating between Lebanon and Israel, following a diplomatic initiative by Lebanese President Joseph Aoun. A phone call took place between the Lebanese…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Axios: Israel’s ambassador to the United States, Yechiel Leiter, said that in a conversation between ambassadors in Washington today, Israel agreed to a follow‑up meeting on Tuesday to advance a peace agreement with Lebanon. However, Israel did not agree to discuss a ceasefire with Hezbollah, which continues to attack Israel and constitutes the main obstacle to peace. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇱🇺🇸 黎巴嫩总统府宣布，在美国总统约瑟夫·奥恩（Joseph Aoun）发起外交倡议后，美国政府已指派国务院在黎巴嫩和以色列之间进行调解。黎巴嫩……之间进行了通话” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Axios：以色列驻美国大使耶希尔·莱特（Yechiel Leiter）表示，在今天华盛顿大使们的谈话中，以色列同意在周二举行后续会议，以推进与黎巴嫩的和平协议。然而，以色列不同意讨论与真主党的停火，真主党继续袭击以色列，是和平的主要障碍。 @wfwitness

text: The ceasefire will only be extended if JD Vance returns from Pakistan with “some sort of deliverable.” Source: Axios, citing a U.S. official
text_zh: 只有当JD·万斯从巴基斯坦带回“某种可交付成果”时，停火才会延长。来源：Axios，援引美国官员的话

text: ↩️ Reply to Middle East Spectator — MES: "Qalibaf exits the plane, then Araqchi.It’s clear who’s in charge of this delegation, and by extension, the country." Having both outside the country is a mistake
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 Middle East Spectator — MES：“卡利巴夫走出飞机，然后是阿拉格希。很明显谁在负责这个代表团，进而负责这个国家。” 两人都在国外是一个错误

text: Qalibaf exits the plane, then Araqchi. It’s clear who’s in charge of this delegation, and by extension, the country.
text_zh: 卡利巴夫走出飞机，然后是阿拉格希。很明显谁在负责这个代表团，进而负责这个国家。

text: — ❗️ 🇮🇱 / 🇮🇷 NEW: Hezbollah has released a video compilation of FPV drone attacks against Israeli tanks and troop carriers in Lebanon During this war, Hezbollah has rapidly increased the use of FPV drones after their effectiveness was proven in Ukraine. @Middle_East_SpectTor
text_zh: — ❗️ 🇮🇱 / 🇮🇷 新消息：真主党发布了一段在黎巴嫩针对以色列坦克和运兵车进行FPV无人机袭击的视频合集。在这场战争中，真主党在FPV无人机在乌克兰证明其有效性后，迅速增加了其使用量。 @Middle_East_SpectTor

text: Iranian delegation arrives in Islamabad, welcomed by Field Marshal Munir and Deputy PM Ishaq Dar. Iran’s Ghalibaf leads the delegation, accompanied by Araghchi.
text_zh: 伊朗代表团抵达伊斯兰堡，受到陆军元帅穆尼尔和副总理伊沙克·达尔的欢迎。伊朗的卡利巴夫率领代表团，阿拉格希陪同。

text: France plans to replace some Microsoft Windows systems in government with Linux to reduce reliance on U.S. tech and gain more control over its data.
text_zh: 法国计划用Linux取代政府中的部分微软Windows系统，以减少对美国技术的依赖并获得对其数据的更多控制权。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇵🇰🇮🇷🇺🇸A Pakistani fighter jet escorting the aircraft carrying the Iranian delegation as they arrive for negotiations with the U.S. in Islamabad. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 Footage shows the Iranian delegation arriving in Islamabad for talks with the United States. Iranian Parliament Speaker Mohammad-Bagher Ghalibaf and Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi were welcomed by Pakistan’s army chief, General Asim Munir. The delegation is named “Minab 168” – a reference to the school strike in Minab where more than 168 children were killed during the war by a U.S. strike. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇵🇰🇮🇷🇺🇸 一架巴基斯坦战斗机护送载有伊朗代表团的飞机，他们抵达伊斯兰堡与美国进行谈判。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 镜头显示伊朗代表团抵达伊斯兰堡与美国进行会谈。伊朗议会议长穆罕默德-巴格尔·卡利巴夫和外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格希受到了巴基斯坦陆军参谋长阿西姆·穆尼尔将军的欢迎。该代表团名为“Minab 168”——这是指米纳布（Minab）学校袭击事件，战争期间有超过168名儿童在美军袭击中丧生。 @wfwitness

text: Trump: My Administration stands ready to use the full Economic Might of the United States to strengthen Hungary’s Economy, as we have done for our Great Allies in the past, if Prime Minister Viktor Orbán and the Hungarian People ever need it. We are excited to invest in the future Prosperity that will be generated by Orbán’s continued Leadership!
text_zh: 特朗普：我的政府随时准备动用美国的全部经济实力来加强匈牙利的经济，就像我们过去为我们伟大的盟友所做的那样，如果维克托·欧尔班（Viktor Orbán）总理和匈牙利人民需要的话。我们很高兴为欧尔班持续领导所带来的未来繁荣进行投资！

text: Qatar shows remains of two Iranian Su-24 fighter jets that were shot down by Qatar early in the war.
text_zh: 卡塔尔展示了战争初期被卡塔尔击落的两架伊朗苏-24战斗机的残骸。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 Israeli drones have been operating over Beirut and its suburbs for over 3 hours at a very low altitude. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Israeli drones continue to operate over Beirut. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 以色列无人机在贝鲁特及其郊区上空以极低高度飞行了超过3小时。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 以色列无人机继续在贝鲁特上空飞行。 @wfwitness
